# Command-GUI Wiki

[English](#english) | [中文](#中文)

---

## English

Welcome to the **Command-GUI** wiki. This documentation covers every feature of the mod in detail.

### Table of Contents

| Page | Topics |
|------|--------|
| [Installation](Installation) | Download, install, and launch |
| [Usage](Usage) | Opening the GUI, tabs, key bindings |
| [Custom Commands](Custom-Commands) | Add / Edit / Delete / Categorize commands |
| [Placeholders](Placeholders) | All placeholder types with examples |
| [Fake Player](Fake-Player) | Batch spawn, timed tasks, individual actions |
| [Preset Commands](Preset-Commands) | Vanilla and Carpet built-in command groups |
| [Settings](Settings) | Tab visibility and persisted settings |
| [Configuration](Configuration) | JSON config reference |
| [Development](Development) | Build, project structure, extending the mod |

---

## 中文

欢迎来到 **Command-GUI** Wiki。本文档详细介绍了模组的每个功能。

### 目录

| 页面 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| [安装](Installation) | 下载、安装和启动 |
| [使用方法](Usage) | 打开界面、标签页、快捷键 |
| [自定义指令](Custom-Commands) | 添加/编辑/删除/分类管理指令 |
| [占位符](Placeholders) | 所有占位符类型及示例 |
| [假人管理](Fake-Player) | 批量生成、定时任务、单个假人操作 |
| [预设指令](Preset-Commands) | 原版和 Carpet 内置指令组 |
| [设置](Settings) | 标签页显示控制与持久化设置 |
| [配置文件](Configuration) | JSON 配置文件参考 |
| [开发](Development) | 构建、项目结构、扩展模组 |
